technology.title: Big Tech, big cons: Scammers are hiding in the apps that make your life easy
technology.summary: In her new book “Bharat Bluff: Inside the Cons of India’s Internet Revolution,” writer Soumya Gupta explores how fraudsters are exploiting the trust people place in big tech platforms like Google, Facebook, and WhatsApp.

briefing.news_focus: In her new book “Bharat Bluff: Inside the Cons of India’s Internet Revolution,” writer Soumya Gupta explores how fraudsters are exploiting the trust people place in big tech platforms like Google, Facebook, and WhatsApp.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 作家Soumya Gupta在其新書《Bharat Bluff: Inside the Cons of India’s Internet Revolution》中探討了詐騙者如何利用人們對大型科技平台（如Google、Facebook和WhatsApp）的信任，進行各種詐騙行為。這些平台的普及使得詐騙活動愈加猖獗，對用戶造成了潛在的風險。
briefing.background: 隨著印度的數位化進程加速，越來越多的人依賴大型科技平台進行日常生活的各種活動，如社交、購物和支付。這些平台的便利性吸引了大量用戶，但同時也成為詐騙者的目標。詐騙者利用用戶對這些平台的信任，設計各種詐騙手法，導致用戶的個人資訊和財務安全受到威脅。Gupta的書籍正是針對這一現象，揭示了詐騙行為的多樣性及其對社會的影響。
briefing.analysis: 詐騙者的活動對大型科技公司構成了挑戰，這些公司必須加強平台的安全性，以維護用戶信任。Gupta的書中強調了詐騙行為的普遍性，這可能促使科技公司重新評估其安全措施和用戶教育策略。參考報導中提到的安全活動雖然與詐騙問題無直接關聯，但反映出科技界對用戶安全的重視。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞專注於詐騙行為的社會影響，而參考報導則關注於具體的安全措施，顯示出科技界在應對風險時的多元策略。

supporting_summaries: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?

technology.title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
technology.summary: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

briefing.news_focus: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國網絡安全和基礎設施安全局（CISA）要求聯邦機構在三天內修復一個被勒索病毒團伙利用的虛擬私人網路（VPN）漏洞。根據Check Point的報告，黑客利用該漏洞入侵了多個政府機構及其他組織，造成了廣泛的安全威脅。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化進程的加速，政府機構對於網絡安全的重視程度日益提高。VPN作為保護數據傳輸安全的重要工具，廣泛應用於政府及企業中。然而，隨著黑客技術的進步，VPN漏洞成為攻擊者的目標，特別是在勒索病毒日益猖獗的背景下。CISA的緊急指令反映了對於這一安全威脅的高度警覺，並強調了及時修補漏洞的重要性，以防止進一步的數據洩露和損失。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了美國政府在網絡安全方面面臨的挑戰，特別是在防範勒索病毒攻擊方面。CISA的要求顯示出政府對於迅速應對安全漏洞的重視，然而，實際修復漏洞的能力和速度可能因各機構的資源和技術水平而異。這也引發了對於政府機構在網絡安全投資及人力資源配置的討論。若未能在限期內修復漏洞，可能會導致更大範圍的攻擊，進一步損害公共信任。此外，這一事件可能促使政府加強對於VPN產品的安全審查，並考慮制定更嚴格的安全標準。

technology.title: WhatsApp ordered to host rival AI assistants for free
technology.summary: Meta has been ordered by the European Commission to restore free WhatsApp access for chatbots made by rival AI providers while the regulator finishes its antitrust investigation. The rare interim measure announced on Tuesday was deemed necessary "to prevent serious and irreparable damage to competition" in the general-purpose AI assistant market. This is only the […]

briefing.news_focus: Meta has been ordered by the European Commission to restore free WhatsApp access for chatbots made by rival AI providers while the regulator finishes its antitrust investigation. The rare interim measure announced on Tuesday was deemed necessary "to prevent serious and irreparable damage to competition" in the general-purpose AI assistant market. This is only the […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐洲委員會已命令Meta恢復免費的WhatsApp訪問權限，讓競爭對手的AI聊天機器人能夠使用該平台。這一臨時措施的宣布旨在防止對一般用途AI助手市場造成嚴重且不可逆轉的競爭損害，目前該機構正在進行反壟斷調查。
briefing.background: 隨著AI技術的快速發展，市場上出現了多種競爭的AI助手，這使得各大科技公司之間的競爭愈加激烈。Meta旗下的WhatsApp作為一個主要的通訊平台，其對於AI助手的接入政策將直接影響市場的競爭環境。歐洲委員會的反壟斷調查旨在確保市場公平性，防止大型科技公司利用其市場主導地位來壓制競爭對手。這項措施的實施顯示出歐盟在科技領域對於維護公平競爭的堅定立場。
briefing.analysis: 這項命令反映了歐洲委員會對於科技巨頭行為的高度關注，特別是在AI技術日益普及的背景下。Meta必須在調查期間遵循這一命令，否則可能面臨更嚴重的法律後果。對於競爭對手來說，這是一個增強市場競爭力的機會，能夠在WhatsApp平台上提供服務，吸引更多用戶。然而，Meta可能會對這一命令提出上訴，試圖維護其商業利益，這可能會延長調查的時間，並影響市場的即時競爭狀況。此外，這一事件也可能引發其他國家或地區對於科技公司反壟斷行為的關注，進一步推動全球範圍內的監管變革。

politics.title: Only one in 10 Europeans now see US as an ally, survey suggests
politics.summary: Exclusive: poll across 15 countries finds ‘deep mistrust’, with majority doubting US would come to their aid in an attack European confidence in an American “security guarantee” has hit a historic low, a survey suggests, with only one in 10 people across 15 countries seeing the US as an ally and majorities in all doubting it would come to their aid if they were attacked. The survey, published on Wednesday by the European Council on Foreign Relations (ECFR) thinktank before critical G7 and Nato summits in France and Turkey over the coming weeks, revealed “deep European distrust in the US”, the authors said. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Exclusive: poll across 15 countries finds ‘deep mistrust’, with majority doubting US would come to their aid in an attack European confidence in an American “security guarantee” has hit a historic low, a survey suggests, with only one in 10 people across 15 countries seeing the US as an ally and majorities in all doubting it would come to their aid if they were attacked. The survey, published on Wednesday by the European Council on Foreign Relations (ECFR) thinktank before critical G7 and Nato summits in France and Turkey over the coming weeks, revealed “deep European distrust in the US”, the authors said. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一項由歐洲外交關係委員會（ECFR）進行的調查顯示，只有十分之一的歐洲人認為美國是盟友，顯示出對美國的深度不信任。調查涵蓋15個國家，結果顯示大多數受訪者懷疑美國在遭受攻擊時會提供援助。這一調查結果在即將召開的G7和北約峰會前發表，凸顯了歐洲對美國安全保證的信心達到歷史低點。
briefing.background: 近年來，隨著國際局勢的變化，歐洲國家對美國的安全承諾產生了疑慮。美國在全球事務中的角色，尤其是在軍事干預和外交政策方面的變化，讓許多歐洲國家對其可靠性產生懷疑。此外，隨著地緣政治緊張局勢的加劇，歐洲國家開始尋求更多的自主防衛能力，這也反映出對美國依賴的重新評估。此調查結果的發表正值G7和北約峰會前夕，這些會議將討論包括安全和防衛在內的重大議題。
briefing.analysis: 調查結果顯示，歐洲國家對美國的信任度大幅下降，這可能會影響未來的國際合作與安全政策。歐洲國家可能會加強自身的防衛能力，尋求更獨立的安全策略，這對美國在歐洲的影響力構成挑戰。此外，這一情況也可能促使歐洲國家在多邊合作中尋求其他夥伴，如北約內部的合作或與其他大國的關係。不同國家的反應可能會有所不同，部分國家可能仍然依賴美國的安全保障，而另一些國家則可能加速尋求自主防衛的途徑。

politics.title: Trump launches strikes against Iran after downing of US army helicopter
politics.summary: US president blames Tehran for loss of Apache gunship, whose crew were rescued by a drone near strait of Hormuz Middle East crisis – live updates The US has launched strikes against Iran after Donald Trump blamed Tehran for downing a US army helicopter near the strait of Hormuz, imperilling a shaky ceasefire that was announced by the two countries in April. The attacks triggered a wave of retaliatory strikes from Iran on Wednesday morning, with Tehran saying it had targeted Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: US president blames Tehran for loss of Apache gunship, whose crew were rescued by a drone near strait of Hormuz Middle East crisis – live updates The US has launched strikes against Iran after Donald Trump blamed Tehran for downing a US army helicopter near the strait of Hormuz, imperilling a shaky ceasefire that was announced by the two countries in April. The attacks triggered a wave of retaliatory strikes from Iran on Wednesday morning, with Tehran saying it had targeted Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普因伊朗擊落一架美軍阿帕奇直升機而對伊朗發動空襲，這一事件發生在霍爾木茲海峽附近。特朗普指責德黑蘭對直升機的損失負有責任，並表示將作出回應。此次攻擊使得四月雙方達成的脆弱停火協議面臨危機。隨後，伊朗也對科威特、巴林和約旦發起了報復性攻擊。
briefing.background: 美伊之間的緊張關係已持續多年，尤其是在核協議破裂後，雙方的敵對行為有所增加。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何軍事衝突都可能對全球能源市場造成影響。特朗普政府在面對內部壓力及國際局勢變化時，對伊朗的軍事行動可能旨在強化其強硬立場，並向國內外傳遞強烈的信號。
briefing.analysis: 此次美國對伊朗的空襲可能會引發更大範圍的衝突，尤其是在伊朗已經對周邊國家進行報復性攻擊的情況下。特朗普的行動可能是為了鞏固其在國內的支持，尤其是在面對選舉壓力的背景下。根據BBC報導，特朗普在攻擊前已經公開指責伊朗，並承諾將會回應，這表明其對伊朗的強硬立場。而《印度教徒報》則指出，隨著美國的軍事行動，油價出現上漲，顯示市場對供應緊張的擔憂。各方的立場顯示出美國與伊朗之間的對抗可能進一步升級，未來局勢仍需密切關注。

supporting_titles: US strikes Iran in response to downing of military helicopter
Oil rises nearly 1% as U.S. launches new strikes against Iran, supply tightens
supporting_summaries: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.
The U.S. military’s strikes on Iranian targets ‌followed after President Donald Trump vowed on Tuesday (june 9, 2026) to respond to the downing of a U.S. Apache attack helicopter overnight

politics.title: US midterms could bring ‘renewed volatility’ to China ties, veteran diplomat warns
politics.summary: If the Democrats win control of Congress in America’s midterm elections it could bring “renewed volatility” to relations with China, a veteran Chinese diplomat has warned. “The results [of the 2026 midterms] … are likely to have a profound impact on the stability of China-US relations,” said Bian Qingzu, former secretary general of the Chinese People’s Association for Friendship with Foreign Countries. Founded in 1954, the association has long been a conduit to foster non-governmental exchanges...

briefing.news_focus: If the Democrats win control of Congress in America’s midterm elections it could bring “renewed volatility” to relations with China, a veteran Chinese diplomat has warned. “The results [of the 2026 midterms] … are likely to have a profound impact on the stability of China-US relations,” said Bian Qingzu, former secretary general of the Chinese People’s Association for Friendship with Foreign Countries. Founded in 1954, the association has long been a conduit to foster non-governmental exchanges...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國一位資深外交官警告，如果美國在2026年中期選舉中，民主黨贏得國會控制權，可能會對中美關係帶來“重新波動”。這位外交官表示，選舉結果將對中美關係的穩定性產生深遠影響，顯示出對未來外交局勢的擔憂。
briefing.background: 中美關係在過去幾年中經歷了顯著的緊張，主要由於貿易戰、科技競爭及地緣政治衝突等因素。美國的內部政治動態，尤其是中期選舉，對外交政策的影響不容忽視。民主黨與共和黨在對華政策上存在顯著差異，民主黨通常較為強硬，特別是在涉及人權和貿易問題上。這使得選舉結果可能直接影響未來的外交策略及兩國關係的走向。
briefing.analysis: 這位中國外交官的警告反映出中方對美國內部政治變化的高度關注。若民主黨在中期選舉中獲勝，可能會導致對中國的政策更加強硬，進一步加劇雙方的緊張關係。此時，中國可能會加強其外交策略，以應對潛在的挑戰。此外，這一情況也可能促使中國尋求加強與其他國家的合作，以平衡美國的壓力。各方利益關係的角力將在未來幾年中持續影響中美關係的穩定性，特別是在經濟和安全領域。

economy.title: China’s factory price jump contrasts with muted consumer inflation
economy.summary: China’s factory gate prices rose by the most since 2022, surpassing expectations, as higher oil costs stemming from the war in Iran help manufacturers escape years of deflation. The producer price index rose by 3.9 per cent from a year earlier in May, more than the 3.5 per cent forecast of economists surveyed by Wind. Consumer prices rose by 1.2 per cent, the same as in April and below the 1.4 per cent forecast. Manufacturers have raised prices for three months in a row after the conflict in the...

briefing.news_focus: China’s factory gate prices rose by the most since 2022, surpassing expectations, as higher oil costs stemming from the war in Iran help manufacturers escape years of deflation. The producer price index rose by 3.9 per cent from a year earlier in May, more than the 3.5 per cent forecast of economists surveyed by Wind. Consumer prices rose by 1.2 per cent, the same as in April and below the 1.4 per cent forecast. Manufacturers have raised prices for three months in a row after the conflict in the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的工廠價格在5月上漲了3.9%，超出經濟學家的預期，這是自2022年以來的最大漲幅。這一漲幅主要受到伊朗戰爭導致的油價上漲影響，使得製造商擺脫了多年來的通縮壓力。相對而言，消費者價格僅上漲1.2%，與4月持平，且低於1.4%的預測。這顯示出製造商的價格上漲趨勢已持續三個月。
briefing.background: 中國的生產者價格指數（PPI）上漲反映了全球油價的波動，尤其是由於伊朗戰爭引發的供應鏈緊張。儘管中國的油品進口量降至八年來的低點，但這並未阻止國內生產成本的上升。相對於生產者價格的上漲，消費者價格指數（CPI）卻顯示出較為平穩的增長，這可能與消費需求疲軟及市場競爭加劇有關。這種情況可能會影響中國的貨幣政策及經濟復甦策略。
briefing.analysis: 中國的生產者價格上漲與消費者價格的穩定形成鮮明對比，這可能使政策制定者面臨兩難局面。一方面，製造商因油價上漲而提高價格，可能會促進企業利潤；另一方面，消費者價格的低增長可能抑制內需，影響經濟增長。參考報導指出，伊朗戰爭可能導致全球油價持續高漲，這將進一步影響中國的生產成本及市場預期。不同報導強調了油價波動對全球市場的潛在影響，顯示出中國在全球供應鏈中的重要性及其面臨的挑戰。

supporting_titles: China's 8-year-low oil imports cushion Iran war shock to global prices
War in Iran could cause the biggest oil shock in years
supporting_summaries: Prices have surged—and may stay high for a while

economy.title: Nike charges World Cup fans the most for replica shirts after price surge
economy.summary: England supporters face paying inflation-busting £95 for an adult shirt as the tournament begins in the US Fans of World Cup teams kitted out by Nike face the highest costs if they want to buy a replica shirt before the tournament kicks off this week amid a “striking” overall increase in prices. Alongside the official match versions, which are retailing for as much as €160, manufacturers typically make “stadium”, or replica, versions aimed at supporters. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: England supporters face paying inflation-busting £95 for an adult shirt as the tournament begins in the US Fans of World Cup teams kitted out by Nike face the highest costs if they want to buy a replica shirt before the tournament kicks off this week amid a “striking” overall increase in prices. Alongside the official match versions, which are retailing for as much as €160, manufacturers typically make “stadium”, or replica, versions aimed at supporters. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著世界杯即將在美國舉行，英格蘭球迷面臨高達95英鎊的成人複製球衣價格，這一價格超出了通脹水平。Nike作為官方供應商，為各參賽國隊提供的複製球衣價格顯著上漲，與官方比賽版本的價格相比，後者甚至高達160歐元。這一現象反映了整體價格的顯著上漲。
briefing.background: 隨著體育賽事的日益商業化，球迷對於球隊商品的需求持續增長，這使得品牌商如Nike能夠提高價格以應對市場需求。此次世界杯的舉辦地在美國，這也可能影響到商品的定價策略。此外，英國的通脹率在近年來持續上升，這使得各類商品，包括體育用品的價格普遍上漲，進一步影響了消費者的購買力。
briefing.analysis: Nike的價格上漲策略可能會引發球迷的不滿，尤其是在經濟壓力增大的背景下。參考報導指出，自上次世界杯以來，英國的啤酒價格上漲了36%，這顯示出整體消費品價格的上升趨勢。這種情況可能會導致球迷在購買球衣時的抵觸情緒，影響Nike的銷售表現。此外，隨著世界杯的到來，其他品牌也可能會跟隨調整價格，進一步加劇市場競爭。各方利益關係的變化可能會影響未來的定價策略和消費者行為。

supporting_titles: UK pint prices up 36% since last World Cup – here's why
supporting_summaries: UK pint prices are up 36% since the last World Cup. We look at why beer now costs so much more.

economy.title: Gold smugglers ‘make a killing’ in India as grey market outshines hefty tariffs
economy.summary: India’s sharp ⁠increase in gold import tariffs is fuelling a resurgence in smuggling that could exceed 100 tonnes this year, as soaring grey market margins allow smugglers to undercut banks and refiners of the precious metal, industry officials and bullion dealers said. India, the world’s biggest gold market after China, more than doubled import tariffs to 15 per cent in May to curb demand, ‌cut the trade deficit and ease pressure on the rupee. But the move has created an opportunity for...

briefing.news_focus: India’s sharp ⁠increase in gold import tariffs is fuelling a resurgence in smuggling that could exceed 100 tonnes this year, as soaring grey market margins allow smugglers to undercut banks and refiners of the precious metal, industry officials and bullion dealers said. India, the world’s biggest gold market after China, more than doubled import tariffs to 15 per cent in May to curb demand, ‌cut the trade deficit and ease pressure on the rupee. But the move has created an opportunity for...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 印度因應金價需求上升，於今年5月將金條進口關稅提高至15%，以減少貿易赤字並穩定盧比。然而，這一政策卻意外促使金條走私活動回升，預計今年走私金量將超過100噸。走私者利用灰色市場的高利潤，能夠以低於銀行和精煉商的價格銷售金條，進一步助長了這一非法市場的發展。
briefing.background: 印度是全球第二大金市，僅次於中國，金條的需求在當地文化和經濟中占有重要地位。為了應對貿易赤字和盧比貶值，印度政府在2023年5月大幅提高金條進口關稅，試圖降低金的需求。然而，這一政策的實施卻導致了金條走私活動的激增，因為走私者能夠在灰色市場中獲得更高的利潤，並以低於官方價格的方式進行銷售，進一步影響了合法市場的運作。
briefing.analysis: 印度政府提高金條進口關稅的決策旨在減少貿易赤字，但卻無意中促進了走私活動的繁榮。走私者利用灰色市場的高利潤，能夠在價格上壓制銀行和精煉商，這對於合法市場造成了直接衝擊。此情況可能導致政府未來在稅收和貿易政策上進行調整，以應對走私問題的加劇。此外，這一現象也反映出市場對金條需求的持續強勁，未來可能會促使政府考慮其他方式來平衡貿易和需求之間的矛盾。
